message:
fix(tests): drop TantivyIndex writer before search to release lock

TantivyIndex::create() holds the writer lock. The runtime's search path
also needs the lock, causing LockBusy failures. Explicitly drop the
index after creation so the lock is released before execute_search_payload.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
